TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Al_Brightman, title = Al_Brightman, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Al_Brightman} }

S.FORM: Al Brightman sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1923 , ryax sa tay 22 nqu tay 9, Al Brightman, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1992) pinqbaqan nya Al Brightman mqwas biru sa Wilson Classical pqwsan biru seneng, Long Beach, California, U.S. Al Brightman mqwas biru sa California State pqwsan biru krahu . Al Brightman, t'aring kawas tay 1945 tehuk kawas tay 1946, mqwas biru sa Charleston pqwsan biru krahu. mintzyuwaw nya Al Brightman sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. maki sa kawas 1946, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na NBA. pincyuwagan nya' cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Al Brightman sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1923 , ryax sa tay 22 nqu tay 9, Al Brightman, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1992) pinqbaqan nya Al Brightman mqwas biru sa Wilson Classical pqwsan biru seneng, Long Beach, California, U.S. Al Brightman mqwas biru sa California State pqwsan biru krahu . Al Brightman, t'aring kawas tay 1945 tehuk kawas tay 1946, mqwas biru sa Charleston pqwsan biru krahu. mintzyuwaw nya Al Brightman sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. maki sa kawas 1946, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na NBA. pincyuwagan nya' cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

(mД§uqil s~Й•a kawas~Й• taj ****) pinqОІaqan nja al ОІriЙЈД§tman mqwas~Й• ОІiru s~Й•a wils~Й•on КҰ~КЁlas~Й•s~Й•iКҰ~КЁal pqws~Й•an ОІiru s~Й•eneЕӢ, loЕӢ ОІeaКҰ~КЁД§, КҰ~КЁali*ornia, u.s~Й•. al ОІriЙЈД§tman mqwas~Й• ОІiru s~Й•a КҰ~КЁali*ornia s~Й•tate pqws~Й•an ОІiru kraД§u . al ОІriЙЈД§tman, tК”ariЕӢ kawas~Й• taj **** teД§uk kawas~Й• taj ****, mqwas~Й• ОІiru s~Й•a КҰ~КЁД§arles~Й•ton pqws~Й•an ОІiru kraД§u. mintzjuwaw nja al ОІriЙЈД§tman s~Й•raral Д§jaК”ЙЈa s~Й•is~Й•juw na nОІa. maki s~Й•a kawas~Й• ****, tК”ariЕӢ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na nОІa. pinКҰ~КЁjuwaЙЈan njaК” КҰ~КЁinkД§ulan s~Й•a knitaК” s~Й•a ОІrОІiruК” lis~Й•ts~Й• o* national ОІas~Й•ketОІall as~Й•s~Й•oКҰ~КЁiation plajers~Й•
